mapper.sql: OPER_ID, OPER_MODULE, OPER_TYPE, OPER_DESC, OPER_REQU_PARAM, OPER_RESP_PARAM, OPER_USER_ID, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_METHOD, OPER_URI, OPER_IP, OPER_CREATE_TIME, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, ORG
mapper.insert: insert into TBL_USER_OPT_LOG (OPER_MODULE, OPER_TYPE, OPER_DESC, OPER_REQU_PARAM, OPER_RESP_PARAM, OPER_USER_ID, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_METHOD, OPER_URI, OPER_IP, OPER_CREATE_TIME, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, ORG) values (#{operModule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operRespParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into TBL_USER_OPT_LOG
OPER_ID,
OPER_MODULE,
OPER_TYPE,
OPER_DESC,
OPER_REQU_PARAM,
OPER_RESP_PARAM,
OPER_USER_ID,
OPER_USER_NAME,
OPER_METHOD,
OPER_URI,
OPER_IP,
OPER_CREATE_TIME,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
ORG,
#{operId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operModule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operRespParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update TBL_USER_OPT_LOG
OPER_MODULE = #{operModule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_TYPE = #{operType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_DESC = #{operDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_REQU_PARAM = #{operRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_RESP_PARAM = #{operRespParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_USER_ID = #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_USER_NAME = #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_METHOD = #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_URI = #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_IP = #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_CREATE_TIME = #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where OPER_ID = #{operId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TBL_USER_OPT_LOG set OPER_MODULE = #{operModule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_TYPE = #{operType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_DESC = #{operDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_REQU_PARAM = #{operRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_RESP_PARAM = #{operRespParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_USER_ID = #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_USER_NAME = #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_METHOD = #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_URI = #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_IP = #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_CREATE_TIME = #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where OPER_ID = #{operId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
